description: Registry of all N8n workflows managed in this stack, with links to their source repositories.

workflows.name: Workflow 1 - Data Transform Trigger
workflows.description: Receives query parameters via HTTP GET, validates and normalises records, returns transformed output.

workflows.name: Workflow 2 - File Processing Trigger
workflows.description: Receives a file reference via HTTP GET, enriches data via JSONPlaceholder API, returns processed output.

workflows.name: Workflow Report - Sales Report Generator
workflows.description: Receives transaction records via HTTP GET, groups by category, returns a ranked revenue report with totals, averages, and percentages.

workflows.name: Workflow DoSomething
workflows.description: POC workflow created via the create-workflow skill. Accepts any JSON object and returns it with processed metadata.

workflows.name: Ryan Do A Thing - Mock POC
workflows.description: A mock POC workflow demonstrating the end-to-end create-workflow skill and CI/CD pipeline. Accepts any JSON object and confirms processing.
